Plugin.Name: LSIUtil
Plugin.Author: DevlinDelFuego
Plugin.Overview: Monitor LSI SAS Host Bus Adapters (9207-8i, SAS2308 family) directly from Unraid. Displays real-time HBA temperature with configurable alert threshold, PCIe link info, per-PHY SAS health counters, attached drive list with SAS addresses, and the HBA firmware event log. Includes an at-a-glance dashboard tile (Unraid 7.2+). The lsiutil binary is bundled - nothing is downloaded after the initial install.
Plugin.Description:
[b]LSIUtil[/b] monitors LSI SAS Host Bus Adapters using the lsiutil utility.
[b]Features:[/b] [ul] [li]Temperature gauge with Unraid alert notification[/li] [li]PCIe width, speed, and power mode[/li] [li]Per-PHY SAS link state and error counters[/li] [li]Attached drive list with SAS addresses and OS device names[/li] [li]HBA firmware event log[/li] [li]Dashboard tile for at-a-glance monitoring (Unraid 7.2+)[/li] [/ul]
[b]Supported hardware:[/b] LSI 9207-8i, 9211-8i, 9205-8i, 9201-16i, and other SAS2x08-family cards using the mpt2sas / mpt3sas kernel driver.
[b]Credit:[/b] Built on the lsiutil binary maintained by Thomas Lovell (https://github.com/thomaslovell/LSIUtil/).
